parameters.query:
-- Support both list and ingest actions
-- action comes from Build NDAA Data output
DO $block$
DECLARE
  v_action TEXT;
BEGIN
  -- We'll handle branching in the response node; just ensure table exists
  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_ndaa_intel (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    section TEXT NOT NULL,
    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    impact TEXT,
    category TEXT,
    source_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_bill TEXT DEFAULT 'P.L. 119-60 NDAA FY2026',
    ingested_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    UNIQUE(section, source_type)
  );
END $block$;
SELECT id, section, title, impact, category, source_type, source_bill, ingested_at FROM gda_ndaa_intel ORDER BY id LIMIT 200;
